description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on a schedule and on push to specific branches and tags. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.11 to 3.14), with Node.js 22.x. It checks out the code, caches pip, npm, and mypy, sets up Python and Node.js, installs dependencies, builds the development environment, and runs tests with environment variables to skip certain tests. Finally, it uploads code coverage to Codecov.
